name: @appstrate/note
description: Append a long-term archive memory. Reachable from the agent only via recall_memory. Supports per-actor and shared scopes.

tool.name: note
tool.description: Append a long-term archive memory — a discovery, fact, or user preference worth keeping across future runs. Archive memories are NOT injected into the system prompt; retrieve them on demand with recall_memory. By default notes are scoped to the current actor (the user or end-user that triggered the run); pass scope="shared" for an app-wide note visible to every actor.

scope.description: Persistence scope: "actor" (default) keeps the note private to the run's actor; "shared" makes it app-wide.
